meaning: adj.(木材等)多结的,多节的,多瘤的,棘手的,困难多的
examples: The new management faces some knotty problems.
Einstein would furiously play his violin as a way to think through a knotty physics problem.
Garston Children's Centre next Thursday and at Knotty Ash Children's Centre on Tuesday 26 March.
Years spent engaging Americans on the knotty conundrums of race leave me confident in that prediction.
